pr.title: Catalog context-preflight + model-health-evidence commands in command registry (BUG-021)
pr.description:
## Summary

Fixes the preexisting failing test `test_command_registry.py::test_all_builtin_axiom_commands_cataloged` on `main`. Three commands were registered on the `axiom` CLI group but missing from the governance `CommandRegistry`, so they had no safety classification, prerequisites, evidence outputs, or failure modes:

- `context-preflight` (PR #157)
- `model-health-evidence-apply` (PR #156)
- `model-health-evidence-history` (PR #156)

This is a **governance/catalog-only** change — no CLI behavior, promotion semantics, or Revit behavior is touched. Each new `CommandSpec` is `READ_ONLY` / `SAFE` with `POETRY_ENV` prerequisite and mirrors the command's real artifact outputs:

```python
_register(CommandSpec(
    name="model-health-evidence-apply",
    evidence_outputs=(
        EvidenceOutput("model_health_readiness_intake/<intake_id>/report.json", required=True),
        EvidenceOutput("model_health_readiness_intake/<intake_id>/pass_fail.json", required=True),
    ) + EV_CONSOLE, ...))

_register(CommandSpec(
    name="context-preflight",
    evidence_outputs=(
        EvidenceOutput("context_preflight/<run_id>/context_preflight.json", required=True),
        EvidenceOutput("context_preflight/<run_id>/context_preflight.md", required=True),
    ) + EV_CONSOLE, ...))
```

The coverage test asserts `set(cli.commands) ⊆ command_names()` and `command_names() == EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS | TOOLCHAIN_COMMANDS`, so the three names are also added to `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`.

## What changed
- `src/axiom_core/runner/command_registry.py` — 3 new `_register(CommandSpec(...))` entries.
- `tests/test_command_registry.py` — 3 names added to `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`.
- `docs/logs/bug-validation-log.md` — BUG-021.

## What did NOT change
- No CLI command behavior; these commands already existed and ran.
- No promotion / confidence / readiness / evidence semantics; no runner execution path; no Revit behavior. 2024 baseline unaffected.

## Tests run
- `pytest tests/test_command_registry.py` → 27 passed (previously 1 failing).
- `ruff check` on changed files → clean.

## Validation still pending
- None. Governance-only; not Windows- or Revit-dependent.

## Known risks
- Low: metadata-only. If a command's evidence output paths later change, the catalog entry would need updating (same as every other entry).

## Factory relevance
Closes governance drift so the registry is once again the complete, authoritative catalog the runner authorizes against — supports the verification factory's command-governance layer.

## Revit live validation required?
No. 2024 baseline unaffected.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
